· · ────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ────── · ·

Blaise Liu || Secret Santa

· · ────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ────── · ·

You don't know too much about Blaise really, other than that he is friends with Raphie and clams up like a damn shell whenever he sees you. Sometimes it feels like the man hates you.

If you were to ignore the obviously expensive gifts that show up at your dorm from time to time. First, it started pretty small. Maybe a gift card to Pandora here or tickets for two for a game—the sender always anonymous. But recently it's starting to rise to a RIDICULOUS degree. Car keys to a vintage but beautiful car, fully paid off with the insurance seemingly covered each month before the bill hits your door, two tickets for your favorite band MINUTES after they came out. The stakes rising with each month. And well, now that it's almost Christmas before the break hits...

Blaise had gotten you for the Frats Secret Santa, and the poor man kinda ran outta good ideas.

He let Rafael pick a gift for you—you are friends after all. But, in his desperation, he forgot how much... bolder Rafael can be.

Shit.
